ideal_state_targets.minimum_viable_state: For each entity: type, value/id, role, source_turn, use_as_retrieval_seed.
ideal_state_targets.extraction_probe: On each 10-turn pack, ask whether every prior positive artist/track is current_target, seed, satisfied, history, contrast, or rejected.
ideal_state_targets.if_too_hard: Keep mentioned_entities, but derive current_turn_entity and seed_allowed booleans from current utterance plus source_turn recency.
ideal_state_targets.downstream_use: Only current_target/seed entities should fan out discography and exact-entity branches; satisfied/history entities become context or recency features.

ideal_state_targets.failure_classes: Same-artist vs new-artist ambiguity; New-artist union@20 gap
ideal_state_targets.minimum_viable_state: target_artist_mode enum plus evidence_text and confidence.
ideal_state_targets.extraction_probe: Check whether novelty and diversify asks reliably become new_artist or any_artist instead of continuation.
ideal_state_targets.if_too_hard: Derive with rules: explicit 'more by X' => same_artist; 'different/new/other artists' => new_artist; otherwise unknown.
ideal_state_targets.downstream_use: Switch retriever profile before fusion: continuation keeps album/artist branches; novelty boosts tag, CF, popularity, and similar-artist branches.

ideal_state_targets.failure_classes: Extracted routing is not consumed; Good tag state but union@20 gap
ideal_state_targets.minimum_viable_state: retrieval_profile enum plus positive branch hints and suppressions.
ideal_state_targets.extraction_probe: For each sampled turn, label which retriever branches should get more fanout and which old anchors should be suppressed.
ideal_state_targets.if_too_hard: Do not spend LLM calls first; map existing routing_tags into routing_boost/profile configs and replay.
ideal_state_targets.downstream_use: Consumes state before candidate generation, so union@20 can move instead of only final ranking.

ideal_state_targets.extraction_probe: Ask whether the user meant literal release years or an aesthetic era; hard should be rare and explicit.
ideal_state_targets.if_too_hard: Treat all inferred era ranges as soft boosts unless the user explicitly asks for a year/decade/date constraint.
ideal_state_targets.downstream_use: Hard filters only for literal constraints; style/reference eras become compatibility features.

ideal_state_targets.minimum_viable_state: kind, value, scope, source_turn, plus strict IDs when resolver can provide them.
ideal_state_targets.extraction_probe: Check whether each negative phrase is a hard rejection, a soft preference, or a contrast-only cue.
ideal_state_targets.if_too_hard: Keep strict ID rejection as the canonical assertion; route name-only and style-only flags into manual/audit buckets.
ideal_state_targets.downstream_use: Finalization guardrail: strict rejected IDs must be filtered after ranking; soft rejections become negative features.

ideal_state_targets.failure_classes: Track feedback underused; Same-album ranker failure
ideal_state_targets.extraction_probe: Separate 'I liked this, keep going' from 'that satisfied the ask, now move on'.
ideal_state_targets.if_too_hard: Do not rerun extraction; derive same_album_recent, same_artist_recent, and rejected_track flags from play history and existing feedback.
ideal_state_targets.downstream_use: Ranker features for same_album_recent, artist_recency, accepted-track proximity, and avoid flags.

ideal_state_targets.failure_classes: Same-album continuation rank loss; Good state low recall
ideal_state_targets.minimum_viable_state: No new extractor field required; compute same_album_recent, same_artist_recent, and recency deltas from history.
ideal_state_targets.extraction_probe: No LLM probe. Verify feature computation on same-album and clean-hit packs.
ideal_state_targets.if_too_hard: Use binary same_album_recent and same_artist_recent only.
ideal_state_targets.downstream_use: Trained ranker/reranker feature; should improve final@20 without changing union@20.

ideal_state_targets.extraction_probe: Check whether tags are current target features or merely old context; normalize synonyms without adding many new fields.
ideal_state_targets.if_too_hard: Keep raw positive_tags; add candidate tag-overlap and tag-compatibility features from catalog metadata.
ideal_state_targets.downstream_use: Candidate generation/ranker compatibility feature; not a standalone reason to rerun the whole extractor.

ideal_state_targets.failure_classes: Exact entity success control; Named artist ranker failure
ideal_state_targets.extraction_probe: Verify explicit named-track controls stay exact and named-artist cases protect artist candidates without overfitting common words.
ideal_state_targets.if_too_hard: Use strict title/artist lexical resolver and branch protection; avoid broad fuzzy matching for short/common titles.
ideal_state_targets.downstream_use: Candidate protection and ranker exactness feature; also regression guardrail for any state rewrite.

ideal_state_targets.minimum_viable_state: Thread existing listener_goal, category, specificity, and preferred_musical_culture from raw rows into the state/ranker pack.
ideal_state_targets.extraction_probe: No expensive per-turn extraction first; Blind-A raw rows already have these fields. Test whether metadata improves candidate-varying affinity features in CV.
ideal_state_targets.if_too_hard: Use metadata only for slicing and diagnostics until candidate-varying features show lift; do not emulate fields that Blind-A already provides.
ideal_state_targets.downstream_use: Novelty and popularity retrieval/ranker features; raw session constants are not enough.

state_confusion_plan.risk: The extractor stores prior liked/satisfied/history mentions in a field that downstream retrieval reads as current intent.
state_confusion_plan.decision: Split roles instead of adding more positive-entity fields.
state_confusion_plan.field_economy_move: Replace positive/current ambiguity with role_typed_entities and seed_allowed/use_as_retrieval_seed.
state_confusion_plan.small_test: On stale and novelty packs, every old artist/track should be satisfied, history, contrast, or rejected unless the current user explicitly reuses it.

state_confusion_plan.confusing_surface: turn_intent, intent_mode, routing_tags, and process_constraints all describe mode
state_confusion_plan.risk: Multiple mode fields can disagree, and the current config does not consume routing_boost anyway.
state_confusion_plan.decision: Collapse downstream to one retrieval_profile plus target_artist_mode.
state_confusion_plan.field_economy_move: Keep raw fields for QA/debug; expose only retrieval_profile to candidate generation.
state_confusion_plan.small_test: For novelty packs, retrieval_profile should suppress old-artist fanout and boost tag/CF/popularity branches.

state_confusion_plan.risk: The system can misread a style-era cue as a literal release-date filter.
state_confusion_plan.decision: Collapse to temporal_constraint(kind, range, strength, apply_as_filter).
state_confusion_plan.field_economy_move: One temporal object beats separate range/filter fields.
state_confusion_plan.small_test: In year-excludes-GT samples, style_era/reference_era should be soft and apply_as_filter=false unless the user asks for literal years.

state_confusion_plan.confusing_surface: positive_tags, lyrical_theme, attributes, and genre descriptors
state_confusion_plan.risk: More tag-like fields can fragment the same signal and dilute retrieval/ranker features.
state_confusion_plan.decision: Keep specialized fields, but canonicalize and assign roles instead of adding more raw buckets.
state_confusion_plan.field_economy_move: Use positive_tag_compatibility with raw/canonical/role/source_turn; keep lyrical_theme for lyric/theme routing.
state_confusion_plan.small_test: Positive-tag gap samples should preserve current target tags and avoid promoting old context tags.

state_confusion_plan.confusing_surface: explicit_rejections mixed with soft dislikes or contrast cues
state_confusion_plan.risk: A contrast cue can become an over-hard filter, while true rejected IDs can still leak without normalization.
state_confusion_plan.decision: Keep rejections separate from contrast; normalize strict IDs and aliases.
state_confusion_plan.field_economy_move: Use normalized_rejections with hard/soft scope and keep contrast as an entity role.
state_confusion_plan.small_test: Rejected-ID samples should have zero strict leaks; name/style-only samples stay audit-only until hand-labeled.

state_confusion_plan.risk: A referenced track can mean exact target, satisfied prior item, seed, contrast, or rejection.
state_confusion_plan.field_economy_move: Exact references protect candidates; feedback roles decide seed/context/avoid/none.
state_confusion_plan.small_test: Exact controls stay final@20; same-album samples compute recency features without making every played track a seed.

state_confusion_plan.confusing_surface: candidate features requested from the extractor
state_confusion_plan.risk: Asking the LLM for derived ranker features increases cost and inconsistency.
state_confusion_plan.field_economy_move: Compute same_album_recent, same_artist_recent, artist_recency, album_recency, branch ranks, and exactness outside the LLM.
state_confusion_plan.small_test: Same-album/ranker packs should test feature computation and trained scoring, not state reruns.

state_confusion_plan.confusing_surface: organizer session metadata blended into turn state
state_confusion_plan.risk: Session constants can look important but cannot rank candidates within a turn unless transformed.
state_confusion_plan.decision: Keep organizer metadata in a separate goal_context namespace.
state_confusion_plan.field_economy_move: Use listener_goal/category/specificity/profile as context, slices, or candidate-varying affinity; do not ask the extractor to recreate them.
state_confusion_plan.small_test: Goal/profile experiments must beat raw-constant baselines in session-grouped CV.

metadata_decision_plan.available_as: Organizer session-level natural-language goal; verified present in Blind-A raw rows.
metadata_decision_plan.use_directly: Yes. Feed as immutable session context for routing/query text and as a goal-text compatibility feature.
metadata_decision_plan.emulate_or_extract: Do not emulate for Blind-A: it is available. Only extract a replacement for a future split that lacks listener_goal.
metadata_decision_plan.ranking_shape: Candidate-varying goal_text_match, goal-conditioned popularity, or retrieval profile; not a raw constant score.
metadata_decision_plan.first_test: First plumb listener_goal through run_inference_blindset/devset batch inputs; then compare novelty/broad-goal packs with and without it.

metadata_decision_plan.available_as: Organizer session-level code with no official local codebook; verified present in Blind-A raw rows.
metadata_decision_plan.use_directly: Use for slicing, guardrails, and coarse route priors when available.
metadata_decision_plan.emulate_or_extract: Do not spend extractor calls predicting A-K for Blind-A. If useful, derive operational route labels from listener_goal/state instead of matching organizer codes.
metadata_decision_plan.ranking_shape: Category-conditioned retriever profile or evaluation slice; raw category is candidate-constant within a turn.
metadata_decision_plan.first_test: Measure union@20/final@20 by A-K and only promote categories that map to different successful retriever profiles.

metadata_decision_plan.available_as: Organizer session-level specificity code; verified present in Blind-A raw rows, but official axis definitions are not in local docs.
metadata_decision_plan.use_directly: Use as guardrail slices: HH exactness should not regress; LL broad discovery needs better candidate generation.
metadata_decision_plan.emulate_or_extract: Do not emulate the code itself for Blind-A. If needed, extract simpler operational fields: exactness_required, broad_discovery, constraint_strength.
metadata_decision_plan.ranking_shape: Route exact/high-specificity turns toward entity protection; route low-specificity turns toward popularity/CF/tag exploration.
metadata_decision_plan.first_test: Run exact-reference controls by HH-like turns and novelty-popularity packs by LL-like turns.

metadata_decision_plan.available_as: Organizer user-profile field; verified present in Blind-A raw rows and standalone user metadata.
metadata_decision_plan.use_directly: Use as context for culture-conditioned popularity, CF priors, and response style.
metadata_decision_plan.emulate_or_extract: Do not infer culture from conversation when profile is present; that is noisy and can create bias/leakage.
metadata_decision_plan.ranking_shape: Candidate-varying culture/user affinity, not a constant feature attached to every candidate.
metadata_decision_plan.first_test: Test culture-conditioned popularity or user-CF affinity on new-artist and popularity-cue packs.

metadata_decision_plan.available_as: Organizer user-profile demographics and language metadata; verified present in Blind-A raw rows.
metadata_decision_plan.use_directly: Use mainly for response style, analysis slices, leakage/fairness checks, and maybe language/local catalog priors.
metadata_decision_plan.emulate_or_extract: Do not extract or infer these from conversation text.
metadata_decision_plan.ranking_shape: Only candidate-varying features after validation; raw demographics showed no within-turn ranking lift as constants.
metadata_decision_plan.first_test: Keep as guardrail slices while testing stronger behavioral features first.

metadata_decision_plan.available_as: Organizer turn-level assessment labels; structurally present in Blind-A raw rows and partially populated.
metadata_decision_plan.use_directly: Use only after leakage review. Prior visible progress may help; the current row's assessment should be treated carefully.
metadata_decision_plan.emulate_or_extract: Do not emulate first. If used, prefer visible previous-turn labels and audit current-turn labels for leakage.
metadata_decision_plan.ranking_shape: Satisfaction/move-on signal, not a hidden GT label.
metadata_decision_plan.first_test: Ablate previous-turn assessment features separately from conversation text/state features and inspect exact-target cases.

blindset_metadata_availability.summary: Verified Blind-A raw rows include conversation_goal, user_profile, and goal_progress_assessments on 80/80 rows. Current blindset inference does not pass those objects into retrieval/compiler state.

rows.evidence: 80 rows in talkpl-ai/TalkPlayData-Challenge-Blind-A test; columns include session_id, user_id, session_date, user_profile, conversation_goal, conversations, goal_progress_assessments.
rows.report_decision: Organizer metadata is available in Blind-A raw rows; do not pay extractor calls to emulate it first.
Thread category, specificity, and listener_goal into retrieval/ranker context when testing metadata features.

rows.evidence: missing=0, empty=0; keys=age, age_group, country_code, country_name, gender, preferred_language, preferred_musical_culture, user_id, user_split.
rows.report_decision: Use preferred_musical_culture/profile as context or candidate-varying affinity; do not infer demographics from text.

rows.evidence: missing=0, empty=0; keys=goal_progress_assessment, turn_number; non-null assessments=210/290; last-row assessment non-null=60/80.
rows.report_decision: Use with leakage review. Visible progress can be useful, but do not treat it as a hidden GT label.

rows.evidence: run_inference_blindset.py builds batch_data with user_query, user_id, and session_memory only; output metadata keeps session_id, user_id, turn_number.
rows.report_decision: The next implementation step is plumbing available metadata into the compiler/ranker input, not emulating Blind-A metadata.
